App.Subtitle: Arrange existing Scenes, review compatibility, then create a separate combined Scene.
App.Title: Scene Merger

Execution.ResolveIssues: Resolve blocking issues and acknowledge reviewed warnings to continue.
Execution.SourceSafety: Source Scenes remain unchanged throughout the merge.
Execution.Title: Ready to merge

Layout.DragScene: Drag {name}; use arrow keys to nudge
Layout.Empty: Add at least two Scenes, then drag their rectangles into the desired freeform layout.
Layout.Help: Drag Scene bounds to position them. Empty-space drag pans; the wheel zooms.
Layout.OverlapWarning: {count} overlapping pair(s). Overlap is allowed, but artwork and copied documents will stack in Scene order.
Layout.PanZoomHint: Drag empty space to pan · Wheel to zoom
Layout.Title: Layout workspace

Loading.Body: Checking permissions and loading World Scenes…
Loading.Title: Preparing Scene Merger

backgrounds.Help: Create locked Tiles for source backgrounds and foreground Level artwork.
backgrounds.Label: Scene backgrounds

drawings.Help: Preserve shapes, points, text, and formatting.
drawings.Label: Drawings

notes.Help: Keep valid Journal and document links.
notes.Label: Notes

sounds.Help: Copy position, radius, path, and volume.
sounds.Label: Ambient Sounds

templates.Help: Core v14 does not expose Measured Templates as Scene embedded documents.
templates.Label: Measured Templates

tiles.Help: Preserve texture, elevation, sort, occlusion, and movement restrictions supported by v14.
tiles.Label: Tiles

tokens.Help: Keep Actor links; Actors are never duplicated.
tokens.Label: Tokens

walls.Help: Translate endpoints and preserve restrictions and doors.
walls.Label: Walls

activateAfterMerge.Help: Make the new Scene active for players after success.
activateAfterMerge.Label: Activate after merging

lockBackgroundTiles.Help: Prevents accidental movement of imported map artwork.
lockBackgroundTiles.Label: Lock background Tiles

navigation.Help: Add the new Scene to the navigation bar.
navigation.Label: Show in navigation

openAfterMerge.Help: Open the new Scene for the current GM after success.
openAfterMerge.Label: Open after merging

Options.Help: Choose exactly what will be cloned into the new destination.
Options.Name: Scene name
Options.Title: Merge options

Results.FailureSafety: Source Scenes were not modified. Any unusable partial destination is cleaned up when safe; consult the module log for details.

Selection.Help: Choose two or more source Scenes. List order controls background stacking.
Selection.NoMatches: No unselected Scenes match this search.
Selection.Title: Source Scenes

CleanupPartial.Hint: Delete an unusable partial destination automatically when a failed merge can be cleaned up safely.
CleanupPartial.Name: Clean up partial destinations

DebugLogging.Hint: Write additional Scene Merger diagnostics to the browser console for troubleshooting.
DebugLogging.Name: Enable debug logging

Validation.Acknowledge: I reviewed these warnings and want to continue
Validation.AcknowledgeHelp: Overlapping artwork, unsupported references, and large layouts may need manual review after the merge.
Validation.Help: Blocking issues prevent an unsafe merge; warnings may be acknowledged.

Issues.assets_unavailable: One or more background or Tile asset paths returned a missing-file response.
Issues.assets_unverified: One or more background or Tile asset paths could not be verified and need manual review.
Issues.background_transform: One or more backgrounds use transforms that require review.
Issues.background_colorMismatch: Source Levels use different background colors; only one destination-wide color can be retained.
Issues.content_templatesUnavailable: Measured Templates are unavailable as Scene content in Foundry v14.
Issues.destination_folderUnavailable: The selected destination folder is no longer available.
Issues.destination_nameRequired: Enter a name for the destination Scene.
Issues.flags_moduleData: Module-specific flags may contain data this merger cannot safely interpret.
Issues.grid_distanceMismatch: Source Scenes use different grid distance scales.
Issues.grid_regionAlignment: A Region uses grid-aligned geometry that may not align in the destination.
Issues.grid_regionShapeUnsupported: Grid-shaped Regions on hexagonal or gridless Scenes cannot currently be translated safely.
Issues.grid_sizeMismatch: Source Scenes use different grid sizes and cannot be translated reliably.
Issues.grid_typeMismatch: Source Scenes use incompatible grid types.
Issues.grid_unitsMismatch: Source Scenes use different measurement units.
Issues.layout_invalidDimensions: A Scene has invalid or unusable playable dimensions.
Issues.layout_duplicate: The layout contains more than one placement for the same source Scene.
Issues.layout_missing: One or more selected Scenes are missing a layout placement.
Issues.layout_unknown: The layout contains a placement that does not belong to a selected source Scene.
Issues.layout_overlap: Scene rectangles overlap. Artwork and documents will use deterministic stacking order.
Issues.levels_multiple: Each source must contain exactly one Level for this merge.
Issues.performance_animatedAssets: Animated backgrounds or Tiles may increase rendering cost.
Issues.performance_area: The destination has a very large total pixel area.
Issues.performance_backgrounds: The merge includes many source background images.
Issues.performance_dimension: A destination dimension is unusually large.
Issues.performance_lights: The combined Ambient Light count may affect performance.
Issues.performance_regions: The combined Region count may affect performance.
Issues.performance_sounds: The combined Ambient Sound count may affect performance.
Issues.performance_textures: The estimated combined texture usage is high.
Issues.performance_tiles: The combined Tile and converted-background count may affect performance.
Issues.performance_tokens: The combined Token count may affect performance.
Issues.performance_walls: The combined Wall count may affect performance.
Issues.references_crossScene: Cross-Scene document references may not all be rewritable.
Issues.regions_attachedUnsupported: Regions attached to Tokens cannot currently be translated safely; disable Regions or detach them in the source first.
Issues.regions_tokenShapeUnsupported: Token-linked Region shapes cannot currently be translated safely; disable Regions or replace those shapes first.
Issues.regions_unsupportedBehavior: Some Region behaviors contain references or behavior types that need manual review.
Issues.regions_unsupportedShape: A Region contains a non-core or unknown shape that cannot be translated safely.
Issues.selection_duplicate: The same Scene was selected more than once.
Issues.selection_tooFew: Select at least two valid source Scenes.
Issues.selection_unavailable: A selected Scene is unavailable or cannot be merged.
Issues.tokens_missingActor: A selected Token references an Actor that is no longer available.

Validation.NoIssues: No compatibility or performance issues were detected.
Validation.Title: Compatibility review
